installCommand: sh -c 'if [ -d frontend ]; then npm ci --prefix frontend; else npm ci; fi'
buildCommand: sh -c 'set -e; if [ -d frontend ]; then npm run build --prefix frontend && rm -rf .vercel-output && mkdir -p .vercel-output && cp -a frontend/dist/. .vercel-output/; else npm run build && rm -rf .vercel-output && mkdir -p .vercel-output && cp -a dist/. .vercel-output/; fi'
